Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class CampaignMember

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.CampaignMember
public class CampaignMember extends SObject

Java class for CampaignMember complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CampaignMember">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Campaign" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Campaign" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CampaignId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="City" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CompanyOrAccount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Country" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoNotCall" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Fax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstRespondedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutOfEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutOfFax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasResponded" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Lead" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Lead" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadOrContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadOrContactOwner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadOrContactOwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListEmailIndividualRecipients" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MobilePhone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Salutation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="State" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Street" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
